blocking_reasons: user has not authorized recurring automation
user has not authorized recurring automation

guardrails.message: 只生成本地研究报告、dashboard、SQLite记录和新旧对比。
正式 raw/private 不完整时，允许生成 research-only 诊断日报；新增执行金额固定 AUD 0。
禁止自动下注、禁止自动提交任何投注指令。
TAB raw 超过 freshness gate 时拒绝发布正式日报。
需要当日私有持仓快照才能更新真实持仓和收益率。
失败 run 不覆盖 latest_commit.json。

required_gates.name: research-only daily PDF
required_gates.evidence: partial_daily_research_latest.json ready, fresh, public-safe, execution stake AUD 0

required_gates.name: fresh TAB raw
required_gates.evidence: raw_refresh_latest.json reports all required boards fresh

required_gates.name: private position snapshot
required_gates.evidence: current-day private position snapshot parsed without unknown statuses

required_gates.name: PDF QA
required_gates.evidence: pdf_qa_latest.json reports required terms and minimum text/page/size

required_gates.name: public artifact safety
required_gates.evidence: public artifact scan has zero private detail or local path markers

required_gates.name: user authorization
required_gates.evidence: config/automation.toml explicitly authorizes recurring report generation only

review_actions: 保持候选包 review-only；未授权前不创建 recurring automation。
确认 4 小时 cadence 是否符合你的正式运行节奏。
授权时只允许 report_generation_only，auto_wagering_allowed 必须保持 false。
